theme_and_archetype.domain: Social App, Private Community, School/Student Network
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Optimistic, tactile, raw, high-contrast, and engaging. Rejects sterile corporate 'SaaS' polish in favor of expressive, blocky, and imperfect Gen-Z aesthetics.

typography.pairing_strategy: Radical weight contrast. Headings are massive and heavy (font-black), while body is highly legible (font-medium). Avoid 'Regular' weight if possible to create visual tension.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Anti-Grid. Use thick paddings. Combine standard centered social feeds with 'bento' layouts for profiles.

structural_layout.main_app: 3-column layout on desktop: Left Sidebar (Navigation, Groups), Center Column (Main Feed/Chat), Right Sidebar (Online Users, Trending, Search).
structural_layout.profile_page: Top cover banner full width, overlapping PFP, followed by a Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) for Bio, Badges, Class/Section, and Feed.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-[#FDFBF7] border-2 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] active:translate-y-[4px] active:translate-x-[4px] active:shadow-none transition-all duration-75 font-bold
buttons.secondary: bg-[#A7F3D0] text-[#111111] border-2 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] active:translate-y-[4px] active:translate-x-[4px] active:shadow-none transition-all duration-75 font-bold

cards.feed_post: bg-white border-2 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] rounded-xl p-6 mb-6

inputs.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#111111] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#A7F3D0] focus:border-[#111111] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)] transition-all duration-75

chat_bubbles.self: bg-[#E6F4EA] border-2 border-[#111111] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-none px-4 py-3 text-[#111111]
chat_bubbles.other: bg-white border-2 border-[#111111] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none px-4 py-3 text-[#111111]

badges.role: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border-2 border-[#111111] bg-[#FF6B6B] text-white

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Abrupt, tactile, and responsive. Avoid long, smooth fades. Use fast, springy transitions that feel like physical buttons being pressed.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard shadows compress, buttons shift down/right slightly.

images.description: Modern high school campus building to provide context for the BISD Hub.
Abstract neo-brutalist background pattern with pastel shapes for user profiles.
Illustration of Gen Z students for empty feed states or welcome screens.

instructions_to_main_agent.registration_flow: Use a multi-step form (stepper) for registration. Collect ID, Full Name, DOB, Class, Section, Email (OTP), Phone (Optional OTP), Status (Current/Ex). Show 'Awaiting Admin Approval' state upon completion.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_and_mod_panels: Design dense 'Control Room' grids (tight spacing, heavy data visualization) for Admin/Mod panels, contrasting with the playful main app.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Create a persistent left sidebar on desktop (hamburger drawer on mobile) containing Home, Global Chat, DMs, Profile, Settings. Right sidebar for 'Trending/Search/Online Users'.
instructions_to_main_agent.global_chat: Implement distinct channels: General, Boys Only, Girls Only, Class Only, Section Only, EX Students. Use distinct tertiary colors (e.g., Lavender, Mint) to differentiate chat room headers.
instructions_to_main_agent.profile_system: Mimic Discord/Twitter profile. The default_profile_banner image URL must be used as the default cover photo. Display Badges (e.g., 'Class Rep', 'Ex-Student') prominently under the Name/Username.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, chat rooms) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='nav-global-chat').
instructions_to_main_agent.component_usage: DO NOT build complex components (dialogs, dropdowns) from scratch. Use Shadcn UI primitives but heavily customize their Tailwind classes to match the 'neo_brutalism' modifier rules defined above.
instructions_to_main_agent.feed_system: Support Official Channels, Feed (Public), and Followings. Use tabs to switch between these feeds on the Home page.
